series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with training of partners (i.e., public agencies, education grant partners, marinas, etc.)in various basic/instructor/instructor trainer level education skills courses conducted or funded by the Division of Parks and Watercraft for water safety education, including, but not limited to: training notes or documentation, applications, and certification records. The training records cover various subjects/skills pertaining to safe boating, OPOTA 80-Hour Instructor Course, water/ice safety, paddling and other forms of training for water safety education.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years after expiration of partner's certification of course completion, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for 3 years after expiration of partner's certification or course completion, then destroy. If paper copies are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
